name: Garlic Braised Tuna Steaks
recipeIngredient: 1 garlic clove, peeled and cut into thin slivers
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tuna steaks in a large skillet.
2. Add the thinly sliced garlic, chopped onions, butter, red wine, water, and bay leaf to the skillet.
3. Stir gently to combine all ingredients.
4. Cover the skillet and cook over medium heat until the tuna is done, about 5-7 minutes per side.
5. Remove from heat and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
